subcodes.first_line: O thou who art intoxicated with the cup of the Covenant of Alast! Though it is the hour of sunset, yet the light rays of the Morn of Guidance are dawning from the Most Glorious Horizon [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای سرمست جام الست هنگام غروب است ولیکن انوار صبح هدی از مطلع افق ابهی ظاهر و
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual meetings; gatherings; devotional gatherings; feasts, @the Kingdom of God [Malakut], @transcendence; unknowability of God
